wordplay_note: Her power to change the past is a con — she is Jory's agent
card_description: Pat Conley (meaning "Conley = hero / valor; Pat = noble") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Ubik*. Anti-psi with the ability to alter the past who secretly serves the demiurge Jory. Name note: Her power to change the past is a con — she is Jory's agent. Reality manipulation as spiritual corruption. First appears in *Ubik*.

reference.brief: Anti-psi with the ability to alter the past who secretly serves the demiurge Jory
